hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "claude|generated with|co-authored"; then echo "Commit message must not contain Claude signatures. Write a clean message."; exit 2; fi; cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo ".") && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 || { echo "Fix TypeScript errors before committing."; exit 2; }; fi'

bash -c 'echo "Pulling latest from remote..." && git pull --rebase 2>&1 && echo "
CORNER GYM — SESSION START
1. Read CLAUDE.md
2. Read docs/task.md — this is your work
3. Read docs/structure.md
4. Read .claude/lessons.md
Then begin.
"'
